channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Federal judge rejects Trump's attempt to erase Jan. 6 riot convictions
item.description: A federal judge has rejected former President Donald Trump's effort to erase convictions related to the January 6 Capitol riot, emphasizing the importance of preserving historical accuracy. U.S. Distr...

item.title: Wildfires Rage Across Ontario and Manitoba, Spreading Smoke to the USA
item.description: Massive wildfires are currently raging across Ontario and Manitoba, Canada, producing thick plumes of smoke that are spreading southward into the United States. The situation, updated on July 18, 2026...

item.title: Brazil and Poland Support Tanzania's Digital Growth Initiatives
item.description: The article highlights international collaboration in advancing Tanzania's digital transformation. Brazil and Poland have expressed support for President John Magufuli's (Dar) initiatives aimed at boo...

item.title: Spain and Argentina Clash in FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 final between Spain and Argentina promises to be a historic showdown. Spain, known as La Roja, reached the final by defeating France 2-0 in the semi-finals, maintaining an unbe...

item.title: Saskatchewan and Ottawa agree to keep research farms operational despite federal plans to close them
item.description: The Saskatchewan government has entered into a memorandum of understanding (MOU) with the federal agriculture department to ensure the continued operation of two research farms in Indian Head and Scot...

item.title: Investigation into stolen precious stones leads to arrests of former police officers
item.description: The Independent Police Investigative Directorate (IPID) has arrested a fifth suspect in connection with allegations that precious stones seized during a police operation were unlawfully removed. The c...

item.title: ADC Announces Deputy Governorship Candidate for Kebbi State Ahead of 2027 Election
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) in Kebbi State has officially named Musa Zagi as the deputy governorship candidate for the upcoming 2027 election. This decision was made public through a stateme...

item.title: Lauren Laverne announces chronic blood and bone marrow condition
item.description: BBC Radio 6 Music presenter Lauren Laverne has disclosed she has been diagnosed with smouldering myeloma, a rare asymptomatic blood and bone marrow disorder linked to blood cancer. While the condition...

item.title: Wildfire Smoke Blankets Major U.S. Cities as Canadian Fires Spread
item.description: The article discusses how wildfire smoke from nearly 120 out-of-control fires in Canada is affecting air quality across the United States and parts of Canada. Thick smoke has turned skies an eerie ora...

item.title: Gabriel Go Faces Data Privacy Charges for Unconsented Video Upload
item.description: The article discusses the legal implications faced by Gabriel Go, an officer under the Metropolitan Manila Development Authority (MMDA), regarding his alleged violation of data privacy laws. The Natio...

item.title: Moira Deeming withdraws legal action against Victorian Liberal Party, ends candidacy dispute
item.description: Victorian MP Moira Deeming has withdrawn her legal battle against the Victorian Liberal Party, effectively ending her candidacy for the November election. This marks the conclusion of a turbulent peri...

item.title: AAP Links Anurag Kumar's Appointment to CJP Protest in Delhi Police Reorganization
item.description: The article discusses the Aam Aadmi Party's (AAP) claim that the sudden appointment of Anurag Kumar as Delhi Police Commissioner is connected to the ongoing Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) protest at Jant...

item.title: South African Youth Drive Innovation and Community Impact Through Mandela Month Projects
item.description: This Mandela Month, South African high school learners are showcasing remarkable initiatives that address pressing community issues. A group of students built a cart to help elderly individuals transp...

item.title: Vietnam and Australian Clubs Participate in Shakey’s Collegiate Tournament
item.description: The article reports that Vietnam and Australian-based sports clubs have officially joined the Shakey’s Collegiate National Invitationals, a prominent university-level volleyball tournament in the Phil...

item.title: Mistrial in Stronach's sexual assault case and criticism of Nenshi's apology for controversial photo
item.description: The article discusses two major developments. First, a mistrial was declared in the sexual assault conviction of Frank Stronach, a prominent businessman, due to procedural irregularities. The complain...

item.title: Lasaco Assurance Recovers from Half-Year Loss Through Cost Efficiency
item.description: Lasaco Assurance has managed to reverse its financial fortunes after reporting a significant improvement in profitability. The company's recent performance shows a shift from a previous net loss of N7...

item.title: Bryson DeChambeau Penalised for Improving Lie at The Open as Herbert and Burns Set Major Records
item.description: Bryson DeChambeau faced a two-shot penalty at The Open after officials ruled he inadvertently improved his lie by stepping on deep grass around his ball on the fifth hole. The American, who finished h...

item.title: Tanzania's Youth Protests and the Role of Generation Z in Political Change
item.description: Tanzania’s Ambassador to Belgium, Luxembourg, and the EU, Abdallah Sefue, has addressed youth-led protests demanding political and social accountability. The demonstrations, driven by Generation Z, hi...

item.title: Gauhati High Court clarifies breast groping isn't part of routine gynaecological exams
item.description: The Gauhati High Court recently ruled that groping a minor patient's breasts during a gynaecological examination is not considered a routine medical procedure. The court upheld the conviction of Dr. A...

item.title: Cultural Diplomacy: Bayeux Tapestry Arrives in UK as Symbol of Post-Brexit Relations
item.description: The Bayeux tapestry, a historic embroidery depicting the Norman Conquest of England, has arrived at the British Museum after years of negotiations between the UK and France. This cultural exchange mar...
